requirement_topic.en: Market Access Governance, Importer Role, and Surveillance Contact
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入治理、进口商角色与监管联络
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入治理、進口商角色與監督聯絡

summary.en: Turkey-facing placement references EU Customs Union-aligned technical practice with TSE TS EN usage and relies on in-country importer or representative governance for market-surveillance communication, corrective action routing, and post-sale support. Road transport and chemical-risk logistics should follow ADR requirements, and common entry logistics are typically routed through Mersin and Istanbul Ambarlı.
summary.zh: 土耳其方向准入参考欧盟关税同盟对齐技术做法，结合TSE TS EN的应用，并依赖境内进口商或代表人的治理体系开展市场监督沟通、纠正措施和售后支持。道路运输与危险物运输应符合ADR要求，常见入境物流口岸为默森和伊斯坦布尔阿姆巴勒。
summary.zht: 土耳其方向准入參考歐盟關稅同盟對齊技術做法，結合TSE TS EN的應用，並依賴境內進口商或代表人的治理體系展開市場監督溝通、糾正措施和售後支援。道路運輸與危險物輸送應符合ADR要求，常見入境物流口岸為默森和伊斯坦堡阿姆巴勒。

standards_or_laws: Law No. 7223 trade and representative practice context used in Turkish market operations
ADR transport requirements for dangerous goods logistics
TSE market-facing conformity channel where applicable

summary.en: China-to-China movements are not bound by Turkey in-country importer representation requirements. Chinese GB/CCC documents remain domestic baseline records and do not by themselves define who owns Turkish post-market obligations.
summary.zh: 中国内地贸易不受土耳其境内进口商和代表人要求约束，GB/CCC文件仍是中国国内基线，不能单独界定土耳其售后监管责任主体。
summary.zht: 中國內地貿易不受土耳其境內進口商和代表人要求約束，GB/CCC文件仍是中國國內基線，不能單獨界定土耳其售後監管責任主體。

gap.en: Most export plans fail at the operational layer when the importer representative, surveillance contact, recall chain, and port logistics are arranged after commercial contract, causing delay in customs handover and technical-file follow-up.
gap.zh: 多数出口计划在操作层面失效，因为进口商代表、监管联系、召回链路和口岸物流安排在合同后期才确认，导致海关交接和技术文件追踪延误。
gap.zht: 多數出口計劃在操作層面失效，因進口商代表、監管聯絡、召回鏈條與口岸物流安排在合同後期才確認，導致海關交接和技術文件追蹤延誤。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory operational obligation for Turkey-facing placement is to have a clear local importer/representative and surveillance-ready documentation chain before dispatch.
mandatory_status.cn: 中国GB/CCC文件是国内基线，但不足以替代土耳其投放所要求的进口商与市场监督接口。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Turkey-ready operationally if the in-country importer and representative obligations are not contractually locked and tied to each shipment lot before departure.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 若境内进口商和代表义务未在出厂前逐批确认并绑定，无法视为在运营层面符合土耳其准入要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 若境內進口商與代表義務未在出廠前逐批確認並綁定，無法視為在營運層面符合土耳其准入要求。
